历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6239, rising to 5134 in 2023, and falling back to 5179 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 5100-5200 range, with the 2025 baseline ranking at 5179. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category was 71 in 2021, 61 in 2023, 89 in 2025, and 73 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), a reduction of 16 students (about 18%) compared to 2025. This significant reduction in enrollment means that competition for admission has eased, and rankings are expected to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the disciplinary resources of the main campus of Harbin Institute of Technology. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, Harbin Institute of Technology ranked 12th overall, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. In the overall ranking of university popularity on Douyin, Harbin Institute of Technology ranked 10th (high popularity), with a large amount of short video exposure, reflecting high attention from examinees. No records of admission gaps have been seen in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation of the main campus, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanics, and Environmental Science and Engineering were rated A+, while Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A, indicating extremely outstanding engineering strength and strong appeal to high-scoring examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment major categories at HIT (Weihai), such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, have been consistently in the high-popularity recommendation or recommended status in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis. The total number of examinees for the 2026 Hubei Province college entrance examination is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (approximately 391,200). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 251,000, with a small expansion of the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5179, the reduction of about 18% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan compared to 2025 (which eases competition and moves rankings forward), the slight increase in the number of examinees in Hubei Province, and the high popularity and top-tier discipline appeal of the university, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 4650, moving forward compared to 2025 (easier to be admitted). The prediction range is 4150-5150.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Examinees with rankings in the prediction range of 4150-4650 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Leading Class, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class); those with rankings of 4650-4900 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Software Engineering, Science-Engineering Cross); those with rankings above 4900 should use Tier 3 as a safety option. Examinees with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4150) can boldly aim for Tier 1 popular majors.
